app.title: RainySteamRecord
app.subtitle: Steam Recording Browser & Exporter
app.firstRun: Clips will be saved to your Desktop. You can change the export path in Settings.

common.selectFilteredHint: Select or deselect every clip in the current filter

library.searchPlaceholder: Search game, App ID, or folder (Ctrl+F)
library.detailedScanError: Detailed scan failed, some metadata might be incomplete: {{error}}
library.noClipsDetail: Please make sure 'Game Recording' is enabled in Steam settings, and you have recorded some gameplay.
library.deleteSelectedConfirm: Move {{count}} selected clips to the Recycle Bin?

conversion.cancelConfirm: Conversion is in progress. Are you sure you want to exit?

exportJobs.title: Export Job Center
exportJobs.subtitle: Active job and history from this session
exportJobs.exitMessage: An export job is still active. The current job will be cancelled before exit, and successfully exported files will be kept.
exportJobs.alreadyRunning: An export job is already running

exportErrors.EXPORT_NO_CLIPS: No recordings were selected for export.
exportErrors.EXPORT_DIR_CREATE: The export folder could not be created. Check the path and permissions.
exportErrors.EXPORT_DIR_INVALID: The export path is not a valid folder.
exportErrors.EXPORT_DIR_NOT_WRITABLE: The export folder is not writable. Choose another folder or check its permissions.
exportErrors.EXPORT_FFMPEG_MISSING: FFmpeg could not be found, so export cannot start. Reinstall the application.
exportErrors.EXPORT_SOURCE_MISSING: Some source recordings were moved or deleted. Refresh the library.
exportErrors.EXPORT_SOURCE_INVALID: Some recordings are incomplete and contain no exportable media session.
exportErrors.EXPORT_SOURCE_UNREADABLE: Some recording files could not be read. Check their permissions.
exportErrors.EXPORT_DIR_IN_SOURCE: The export folder cannot be inside a source recording folder.
exportErrors.EXPORT_SPACE_CHECK_FAILED: The available disk space could not be determined.
exportErrors.EXPORT_SPACE_INSUFFICIENT: Not enough space on the export drive: {{required}} required, {{available}} available.
exportErrors.EXPORT_TEMP_SPACE_INSUFFICIENT: Not enough space on the system temporary drive: {{required}} required, {{available}} available.
exportErrors.EXPORT_TRIM_INVALID: The trim range is invalid. Set the start and end times again.

initialization.noAccounts: No Steam accounts found. Please check if the selected userdata directory is correct.

steamVersion.title: Select Steam Version
steamVersion.question: Which version of Steam are you using?
steamVersion.invalid: Selected directory is not a valid userdata folder.

preview.nativeRequired: This recording cannot use the built-in preview
preview.nativeRequiredHint: Open the native player to check the time, then return here and enter the in and out points manually. No proxy video will be generated.

trim.title: Trim Export
trim.hint: Drag the range, enter a time, or press I / O at the playhead to set in and out points
trim.accurateHint: Re-encodes to H.264/AAC for accurate cut points and broad compatibility, but takes longer.
trim.losslessHint: Copies the original streams with no quality loss. It is fast, but the start may move to a nearby keyframe.

contextMenu.deleteConfirm: Move clip “{{name}}” to the Recycle Bin?

messages.scanningDetails: Scanning sizes, media metadata, and health in the background. The current list remains usable.
messages.fullScanFailed: Background detail scan failed. The current list was preserved: {{error}}
messages.userdataPathInvalid: Steam accounts folder does not exist or is invalid: {{error}}. Please select again.
messages.noClips: Clip folder is empty. Please record at least one clip before using.
messages.noSteamFound: Could not automatically find Steam userdata. Please select manually or retry.
messages.deleteConfigConfirm:
Are you sure you want to delete the entire config folder?
This action cannot be undone.
messages.exportPathInvalid: Selected export directory is invalid, using default: {{path}}
messages.gameIdsUpToDate: No update needed - database is already up to date.
messages.noUpdate: You are using the latest version.
messages.updateCheckFailed: Failed to fetch latest version info.
messages.configDeleted:
Config folder deleted.
Application will close.
messages.clipsDeleted: Moved {{count}} clips to the Recycle Bin
